user.title: Erftverband HOWIS – Gauge Selection
user.description: Select one or more gauging stations from the list.

data_description.scan_interval: Time between two HOWIS requests in seconds.
data_description.stale_threshold: Age in minutes after which measurement data is considered stale.
data_description.load_all_stations: Automatically loads all currently available HOWIS gauges. Visible gauges can then be selected per dashboard card.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Erftverband HOWIS.
error.invalid_station: Selected gauging station was not found.
error.no_stations: At least one gauging station must be selected.

abort.already_configured: This data source is already configured.

data_description.load_all_stations: Automatically loads all currently available HOWIS gauges.
